action: Implement the 12-month security program roadmap as prioritized below
rationale: Roadmap derived from posture score 58, enterprise risk ALE $2,400,000, and 3 compliance gap(s). All 7 initiative(s) are traceable to a specific gap or risk finding.
key_findings: Q1 quick wins (3 initiatives): Improve detection security domain coverage, Mitigate Ransomware via unpatched VPN appliances

roadmap_items.success_metric: detection domain score >= 65 by end of Q1

roadmap_items.initiative: Mitigate Ransomware via unpatched VPN appliances
roadmap_items.success_metric: ALE reduced below risk appetite threshold of $500,000

roadmap_items.initiative: Remediate SOC 2 gap: MFA enforcement control
roadmap_items.addresses_gap: Compliance gap in SOC 2 — CC6.1 MFA enforcement
roadmap_items.success_metric: SOC 2 gap closed; control CC6.1 implemented
identity-access domain score >= 65 by end of Q2

roadmap_items.initiative: Remediate ISO 27001 gap: incident management procedure
roadmap_items.addresses_gap: Compliance gap in ISO 27001 — A.16.1.1 incident procedures
roadmap_items.success_metric: ISO 27001 gap closed; control A.16.1.1 implemented

roadmap_items.initiative: Remediate PCI DSS gap: network segmentation
roadmap_items.addresses_gap: Compliance gap in PCI DSS — Requirement 1.3 network segmentation
roadmap_items.success_metric: PCI DSS gap closed; control Req 1.3 implemented
cloud-infra domain score >= 65 by end of Q4
